title: Evangelion font
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion font             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Dec 29, 2008 6:48 am I have a small question... Does anyone know then name of the font that is used in Evangelion? Like when they show the episode name.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Dec 29, 2008 7:56 am MS Mincho?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Dec 29, 2008 9:20 am Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Dec 29, 2008 11:46 am I think Bold Mincho was also used. Trying to find either as a font to download has been hard; seems the only way they're available is to just pay for them.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Dec 29, 2008 12:43 pm [redacted]

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Dec 29, 2008 1:55 pm MsMincho and MSGothic come with windows, at least with 2000 and some XP's.

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Tue Dec 30, 2008 4:19 am This reminds me of my old quest to find the font used for old Windows startup screens (2000 and older). Oh, speaking of Windows Startup fonts, the startup fonts for Windows 3.1 and the Evangelion episode name fonts look so goddamn similar.

[]: Evangelion font             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Dec 29, 2008 6:48 am I have a small question... Does anyone know then name of the font that is used in Evangelion? Like when they show the episode name.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Dec 29, 2008 7:56 am MS Mincho?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Dec 29, 2008 12:43 pm [redacted]

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Dec 29, 2008 1:55 pm MsMincho and MSGothic come with windows, at least with 2000 and some XP's.

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Tue Dec 30, 2008 4:19 am This reminds me of my old quest to find the font used for old Windows startup screens (2000 and older). Oh, speaking of Windows Startup fonts, the startup fonts for Windows 3.1 and the Evangelion episode name fonts look so goddamn similar.
